description_long: This house features a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements, with a prominent gable roof and a mix of brick and light-colored siding. The structure is set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a small porch area at the front, partially shaded by the roof overhang, and is surrounded by a few mature trees and landscaped greenery. The rear of the house appears to have a more private garden space, while the side elevation reveals a secondary entrance and additional windows. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented residence with a focus on both curb appeal and functional outdoor space.
description: A two-story house with a gable roof, brick and light siding, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped front and rear yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, gable roof, and landscaped front yard with a walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, brickwork, secondary entrance, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden area, back facade, and additional windows under the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the neighboring structure, side yard, and more landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, steps, overhang, and minimal decorative elements
